trigger: supplement contains omega-3/fish oil and user reports anticoagulant use or bleeding history
proposed_action: show caution message and ask user to confirm anticoagulant, antiplatelet, surgery, and bleeding history
evidence_basis: PubMed systematic search target anticoag_refined plus NIH/NCCIH safety materials

trigger: vitamin K supplement or abrupt dietary vitamin K change in warfarin user
proposed_action: advise stable intake and clinician-led INR monitoring rather than unsupervised dose change
evidence_basis: NIH ODS vitamin K fact sheet and anticoagulant interaction guidance

trigger: CoQ10 or multi-nutrient product that may alter warfarin response
proposed_action: flag as interaction requiring medication and INR review
evidence_basis: exploratory knowledge pack and follow-up full text review

trigger: calcium supplement use in user with stone history, hypercalciuria, or high vitamin D co-use
proposed_action: separate dietary calcium from supplemental calcium and recommend clinician review of total intake
evidence_basis: PubMed kidney_stone_refined search plus NIH ODS calcium and kidney stone guidance

trigger: high-dose vitamin D or combined calcium/vitamin D in renal high-risk context
proposed_action: flag need for serum calcium, urinary calcium, and total intake review
evidence_basis: NIH ODS vitamin D/calcium fact sheets and kidney stone search output

trigger: high-dose vitamin C supplement in user with calcium oxalate stone or hyperoxaluria history
proposed_action: warn that high-dose supplemental vitamin C needs individual review in stone-prone users
evidence_basis: NIH ODS vitamin C fact sheet and kidney stone guidance
